title: Cornyn flips position as Trump, Talarico agree on federal gas tax pause
shortDescription: President Trump, a Democratic Senate candidate, and a Republican senator align on pausing the federal gas tax amid high prices.

title: Trump puts Vance against Rubio in impromptu poll
shortDescription: At a dinner in the Rose Garden, President Donald Trump asked guests to pick between JD Vance and Marco Rubio for a 2028 candidate.

title: Trump sets date for medical exam, his fourth checkup since last year
shortDescription: President Donald Trump is set to receive annual medical and dental examinations on May 26, his fourth visit to medical experts in his second term.

title: Trump takes jab at Pritzker's weight with AI Truth Social post
shortDescription: Donald Trump took to social media to mock JB Pritzker's weight with an AI-generated picture. Here's what he said.

title: Pentagon increases cost of war in Iran to $29 billion: Live updates
shortDescription: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth said the US has a plan to escalate the war in Iran "if necessary" as the Pentagon raised the war's cost to $29 billion.

title: Trump nominates Kari Lake as US ambassador to Jamaica
shortDescription: Former broadcaster Kari Lake has no known diplomacy background and faces Senate confirmation to her latest post in the Trump administration.

title: ATF takes fewer gun shop licenses, reversing Biden-era trend
shortDescription: The ATF revoked 56 gun shop licenses in 2025. That's compared to 183 revocations in 2024 under President Biden's "zero tolerance" policy.

title: Are Nebraska Senate Democratic candidates trying to 'trick' voters?
shortDescription: The Democratic primary is an unusual proxy battle due to the general election between GOP Sen. Pete Ricketts and independent populist Dan Osborn.

title: 'Obsessed.' Comey says Trump DOJ may try to indict him a third time
shortDescription: Former FBI Director James Comey said Trump's Justice Department may try to prosecute him a third time if its current case crumbles.

title: Trump administration sued over Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool
shortDescription: The Cultural Landscape Foundation sued the Department of the Interior, claiming it violated federal law for recent Reflecting Pool changes.

title: Gun shop license revocations plummet under Trump
shortDescription: The Trump administration has shifted toward policies viewed as favorable to the firearms industry. Gun shop license revocations have plummeted.

title: Trump says he still wants to visit Fort Knox to see if gold is there
shortDescription: President Donald Trump said in a recent interview that he's still interested in seeing whether the nation's gold is at Fort Knox.

title: Trump 'considering' Venezuela as 51st state, acting president responds
shortDescription: Trump has again suggested that his administration is considering annexing the oil-rich Venezuela after capturing its president, per Fox News.

title: Poll: One-third say at least one Trump assassination attempt was staged
shortDescription: A new NewsGuard/YouGov poll reveals about one in four believe the recent April 25 assassination attempt on President Donald Trump was staged.

title: Virginia Democrats ask Supreme Court to revive House map
shortDescription: Virginia is among a growing number of states asking the justices for emergency help to change its congressional map before elections this fall.

title: What is the federal gas tax, and will there really be a tax holiday?
shortDescription: Gas prices are still high, and this PA lawmaker wants a break on gas taxes.

title: Trump team addresses hantavirus concerns
shortDescription: President Trump and health officials push back on concerns about U.S. preparedness for hantavirus during a White House exchange.

title: 'Don Colossus' statue of Trump not a 'golden calf,' pastor insists
shortDescription: A new statue has gone up at Trump National Doral Miami. A pastor led a ribbon cutting ceremony, but he says it isn't a 'golden calf.'

title: Two-thirds say Trump hasn't made a case for Iran war, poll finds
shortDescription: A new poll found most Americans think President Trump has failed to give a clear reason for the Iran war, and they're feeling the pinch of higher gas prices.

title: Elon Musk, Tim Cook to join Trump in China for high-stakes meeting
shortDescription: Tesla CEO Elon Musk and Apple CEO Tim Cook are among 17 business executives who will company President Trump on his high-stakes trip to China.

title: Trump pressed on hantavirus response
shortDescription: Trump defends US hantavirus response and says leaving the World Health Organization was the right decision.

title: Trump says Iran ceasefire is on 'life support'
shortDescription: President Donald Trump calls the Iran ceasefire "unbelievably weak" and says it is on "life support" after rejecting Iran's conditions to end the war.

title: Trump news and schedule for May 11 from the Trump Connect reporter
shortDescription: Happy belated Mother’s Day. Trump hosts a maternal healthcare event and the Indiana University football team today. Trump news rundown for May 11.

title: Trump calls for suspending the federal gas tax amid soaring pump prices
shortDescription: President Donald Trump said he wants to suspend the federal tax on gasoline amid soaring energy prices during the United States war with Iran.

title: When is President Trump going to China? See his schedule
shortDescription: President Donald Trump is headed to China this week, where the war in Iran is sure to be a topic of discussion. When will he be gone? See schedule.

title: When, where to vote early in Pittsburgh before PA primary election
shortDescription: Primary Election Day in Pittsburgh and Allegheny County is May 19, and the deadline to cast your vote early is nearly here.

title: Here's what's at stake in midterm elections this week
shortDescription: Two states choose candidates for U.S. House and Senate.
